units.title: Starter Units 1-3 入门单元

words.example: I get up at six in the morning.
I do my homework in the evening.
Look at the map on the wall.
I'd like a cup of tea.

units.title: Unit 1 My name's Gina.

words.example: I go to school every day.

units.title: Unit 2 This is my sister.

words.example: My father works in a hospital.
This is a photo of my family.
words.exampleZh: 这是我家的一张全家福。

units.title: Unit 3 Is this your pencil?

words.example: Our English teacher is Mr. Wang.
words.exampleZh: 我们的英语老师是王老师。

words.example: My father gave me a watch.
words.exampleZh: 我爸爸给了我一块手表。

words.example: I use the computer to study.

words.exampleZh: 我收到了一张生日卡片。
把它写在你的笔记本上。

words.example: I often study in the library.
May I ask you a question?
words.exampleZh: 我可以问你一个问题吗？

units.title: Unit 4 Where's my schoolbag?

words.example: The book is on the table.
My hat is on the bed.
The cat is on the sofa.
The cat is under the table.
There is a lamp on the desk.
I think it's a good idea.
I listen to the radio every morning.
The clock on the wall says 8 o'clock.

units.title: Unit 5 Do you have a soccer ball?

words.example: Do you have a soccer ball?
The ball is under the chair.
She is on the volleyball team.
We are in the same class.
We had fun at the party.
words.exampleZh: 我们在派对上玩得很开心。

units.title: Unit 6 Do you like bananas?

words.example: An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
words.exampleZh: 一天一苹果，医生远离我。
草莓是我最喜欢的水果。

words.example: I had two eggs for breakfast.
It's important to eat healthy food.
What do you have for lunch?

units.title: Unit 7 How much are these socks?

words.example: I want to buy a white T-shirt.
My mother knit me a sweater.
words.exampleZh: 妈妈给我织了一件毛衣。

words.example: I need a new pair of shoes.
She is wearing a red skirt.
This shirt is too big for me.
words.exampleZh: 这件衬衫对我来说太大了。

words.example: The woman in red is my aunt.
words.exampleZh: 穿红衣服的女人是我阿姨。

words.example: What's the price of this hat?
There is a clothing store near my home.
words.exampleZh: 我家附近有一家服装店。

units.title: Unit 8 When is your birthday?

words.example: There are twelve months in a year.
We have a long holiday in May.
My summer vacation ends in August.
We are having a birthday party.
words.exampleZh: 我们要举办一个生日聚会。

words.example: We have an English test next week.
We are going on a school trip.

units.title: Unit 9 My favorite subject is science.

words.exampleZh: 我最喜欢的科目是科学。

words.example: How many subjects do you study?

words.exampleZh: 数学是我最喜欢的科目。

words.example: We have Chinese classes every day.
Geography class teaches us about the world.
words.exampleZh: 地理课教我们认识世界。

words.example: We have P.E. on Monday and Wednesday.
words.exampleZh: 我们周一和周三有体育课。

words.example: We have a test on Thursday.

units.title: 【下册】Unit 1 Can you play the guitar?

words.exampleZh: 请在这里写下你的名字。

words.example: Can you tell me a story?
Grandma tells me a story every night.
words.exampleZh: 奶奶每晚给我讲一个故事。

words.example: She plays the piano every day.
He wants to play the drums.
I want to join the music club.
He wants to be a musician.

units.title: 【下册】Unit 2 What time do you go to school?

words.example: I get up at six every morning.
I brush my teeth twice a day.
I take a shower every morning.
I usually go to bed at ten.
I sometimes watch TV after dinner.

units.title: 【下册】Unit 3 How do you get to school?

words.example: I ride my bike to school.
My father drives me to school.
I walk to the park every evening.
I take the subway to work.
She goes to Shanghai by train.
I go to school by bus.
Riding a bike is good exercise.
words.exampleZh: 骑自行车是很好的运动。

words.example: There are many cars on the road.
It's about five kilometers from here.
How far is it from your home to school?
He lives in a small village.
Be careful when you cross the road.
There is a bridge over the river.

units.title: 【下册】Unit 4 Don't eat in class.

words.example: We must follow the school rules.
We can play outside after school.
words.exampleZh: 放学后我们可以在外面玩。

words.example: Please be quiet in the library.
Mom is cooking in the kitchen.
You need to relax after studying.
I like to read before bed.

units.title: 【下册】Unit 5 Why do you like pandas?

words.example: Let's go to the zoo this weekend.
words.exampleZh: 这周末我们一起去动物园吧。

words.example: Elephants are the largest land animals.
words.exampleZh: 大象是最大的陆地动物。

words.example: The lion is the king of animals.

words.exampleZh: 大象是非常聪明的动物。

words.example: There is a panda on the flag.

words.exampleZh: 我们应该拯救濒危动物。

units.title: 【下册】Unit 6 I'm watching TV.

words.example: My father is reading a newspaper.
My house is near the park.
Would you like something to drink?
The kids are swimming in the pool.
words.exampleZh: 孩子们正在游泳池里游泳。

words.example: She is shopping at the supermarket.
There is a supermarket near my home.

units.title: 【下册】Unit 7 It's raining!

words.example: It's cloudy, maybe it will rain.
It's a sunny day. Let's go out.
words.exampleZh: 今天是晴天，我们出去吧。

words.example: It often snows in winter here.
We often go to the park on sunny days.

units.title: 【下册】Unit 8 Is there a post office near here?

words.example: Is there a post office near here?
My father works in an office.
There is a police station near the park.
words.exampleZh: 公园附近有一个警察局。

words.example: The hotel is on Center Street.
There is a Chinese restaurant near here.
The bank is across from the hotel.
The hospital is on North Street.
Go along this street and turn left.
words.exampleZh: 沿着这条街走然后左转。

words.example: The school is across from the park.
The library is between the bank and the hotel.
words.exampleZh: 图书馆在银行和酒店之间。

units.title: 【下册】Unit 9 What does he look like?

words.example: Her hair is long and straight.
The box is too heavy for me.
words.exampleZh: 这个箱子对我来说太重了。

words.example: He is a handsome young man.
words.exampleZh: 他是一个英俊的年轻人。

words.example: She is a very kind person.

words.exampleZh: 你能描述一下那个人吗？

words.example: This is the best way to learn.

units.title: 【下册】Unit 10 I'd like some noodles.

words.example: I'd like a bowl of noodles.
Put some cabbage in the soup.
What size bowl of noodles would you like?
I'd like a small bowl of rice.
We eat dumplings during Spring Festival.
I'd like some pancakes for breakfast.
Too much candy is bad for teeth.
words.exampleZh: 吃太多糖果对牙齿不好。

words.example: I want to travel around the world.
People in different countries eat different food.
words.exampleZh: 不同国家的人吃不同的食物。

units.title: 【下册】Unit 11 How was your school trip?

words.example: The farmer milks the cows every day.
I want to ride a horse.
We visited a farm on the school trip.
words.exampleZh: 我们在学校旅行中参观了一个农场。

words.example: We picked strawberries on the farm.
They grow vegetables on the farm.
I went to the museum yesterday.

units.title: 【下册】Unit 12 What did you do last weekend?

words.example: We went camping by the lake.
There is a beautiful lake near the camp.
words.exampleZh: 营地附近有一个美丽的湖。

words.example: There are many sheep on the hill.
I felt very tired after the long walk.
words.exampleZh: 长途步行后我感到很累。

words.example: I stayed at home last weekend.
A mouse ran across the floor.
Learning a new language is fun.
words.exampleZh: 学习一门新语言很有趣。
